creator: harry@omnisec.de
text:
eGroupWare is released in version 1.2.106 which fixes several bugs
	and most important is PHP5.2 compatible.
	And while here I cleaned up the versioning a bit. Before, it wasn't
	clear which vendor version of the package is installed.
	Additionally I addded options (with mbstring not selectable at the
	moment because there's a nasty bug in PHP5.2 mbstring extension).
	After all I thought one could avoid the WRKDIR extraction, instead 
	extract it into the destination.
	Also some neccessary directories are created and the default
	path is replaced in the installation template.

Fix: 

Apply the patch
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
